title: vendredia berteroi
side_effects: Vendredia berteroi can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant or excessive consumption can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and even seizures in rare cases. In addition, Vendredia berteroi may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants, which can result in adverse reactions. If not handled and used correctly, the plant can also lead to skin irritation, respiratory issues, and an increased heart rate.
